description: After heavy rain, an excavation is filled with water. The superintendent must manage dewatering operations in compliance with environmental permits.

nodes.task_description: Deploy a pump and filter bag to the excavation to begin dewatering.

expected_outcome.expected: Equipment is set up to remove the water.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the discharged water is being directed to the correct storm drain inlet as specified in the SWPPP.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the discharge location is compliant.

nodes.task_description: Log the dewatering activity, including start and end times, in the daily log.

expected_outcome.expected: The activity is documented for compliance records.
